case_title: ANTON PEDRUCO VS. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PEDRUCO, ANTON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-19-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CAROL ROBINSON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEDRUCO, ANTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,610.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
